name: Western Magnesium Corporation
description: Western Magnesium Corporation is a Canadian-based company focused on becoming a low-cost producer of high-purity magnesium metal. Utilizing a proprietary continuous silicothermic process, the company aims to produce magnesium with low energy consumption and minimal environmental impact compared to traditional methods. Western Magnesium is positioning itself as a strategic supplier for the automotive, aerospace, and defense industries, supporting the global shift toward lightweight materials and sustainable manufacturing. The company operates a commercial pilot plant in Harrison County, Ohio, to demonstrate its innovative technology at scale.
